title: Eriophyton tuberosum
taxonomy: Eriophyton tuberosum is classified under the family Lamiaceae, which is a large and diverse group of flowering plants commonly known as mint or deadnettle family. This family includes many species of herbs, shrubs, and trees, and is found in various parts of the world. Eriophyton tuberosum is further classified under the genus Eriophyton, which is a small genus of flowering plants. The genus Eriophyton is native to the Himalayan region and is characterized by its small, tubular flowers and woody stems. Eriophyton tuberosum's classification reflects its unique characteristics and its place within the larger family of Lamiaceae.
